items.docs: Retrieves a list of all organisations the authenticated user has access to. Returns organisation details including name, subscription information, and feature usage.

params.name: organisation_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the organisation

items.docs: Retrieves the details of a specific organisation by its ID, including the organisation name, subscription plan, and feature usage limits.
Retrieves a list of all projects the authenticated user has access to across all organisations.
Creates a new project within an organisation. Projects are containers for environments and feature flags.

params.name: project_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the project

items.docs: Retrieves the details of a specific project by its ID, including its name, organisation, and associated environments.

params.name: project_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the project

items.docs: Updates the details of an existing project. Allows modification of the project name and other configurable properties.

params.name: project_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the project

items.docs: Permanently deletes a project and all associated environments, feature flags, and data. This action cannot be undone.
Retrieves a list of all environments the authenticated user has access to. Environments represent deployment stages within a project.

params.name: environment_api_key
params.description: The API key for the environment

items.docs: Retrieves the details of a specific environment by its API key, including its name, project, and feature states.

params.name: environment_api_key
params.description: The API key for the environment

items.docs: Updates the details of an existing environment including its name, description, and configuration properties.

params.name: project_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the project

items.docs: Retrieves a list of all feature flags defined within a specific project. Returns feature metadata including name, type, description, and default values.

params.name: project_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the project

items.docs: Creates a new feature flag within a project. The feature will be created across all environments with the specified default values.

params.name: project_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the project

params.name: feature_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the feature

items.docs: Retrieves the details of a specific feature flag by its ID within a project, including its configuration and multivariate options.

params.name: project_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the project

params.name: feature_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the feature

items.docs: Updates the details of an existing feature flag including its name, description, type, and multivariate options.

params.name: project_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the project

params.name: feature_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the feature

items.docs: Permanently deletes a feature flag from a project. This removes the feature from all environments. This action cannot be undone.

info.name: List feature states for an environment

params.name: environment_api_key
params.description: The API key for the environment

items.docs: Retrieves a list of all feature states within a specific environment. Feature states represent the enabled status and value of each feature flag within the environment.

params.name: environment_api_key
params.description: The API key for the environment

params.name: feature_state_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the feature state

items.docs: Updates the state of a feature flag within a specific environment. Allows toggling the enabled status and changing the feature value.

params.name: project_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the project

items.docs: Retrieves a list of all segments defined within a specific project. Segments define groups of users based on trait-based rules for targeted flag delivery.

params.name: project_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the project

items.docs: Creates a new segment within a project. Segments define groups of users based on trait-based rules and conditions for targeted feature flag delivery.

params.name: project_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the project

params.name: segment_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the segment

items.docs: Retrieves the details of a specific segment by its ID within a project, including its rules and conditions.

params.name: project_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the project

params.name: segment_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the segment

items.docs: Updates the details of an existing segment including its name, description, and rules.

params.name: project_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the project

params.name: segment_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the segment

items.docs: Permanently deletes a segment from a project. Any segment overrides associated with this segment will also be removed. This action cannot be undone.

params.name: environment_api_key
params.description: The API key for the environment

items.docs: Retrieves a paginated list of all user identities within a specific environment. Identities represent individual users with their associated traits and flag overrides.

params.name: environment_api_key
params.description: The API key for the environment

params.name: identity_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the identity

items.docs: Retrieves the details of a specific identity by its ID within an environment, including its identifier and associated traits.

params.name: environment_api_key
params.description: The API key for the environment

params.name: identity_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the identity

items.docs: Permanently deletes an identity and all associated traits and flag overrides from an environment. This action cannot be undone.

params.name: organisation_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the organisation

items.docs: Retrieves a list of all users belonging to a specific organisation, including their roles and permissions.

params.name: environment_api_key
params.description: The API key for the environment

items.docs: Retrieves a list of all webhooks configured for a specific environment. Environment webhooks receive flag evaluation data for identified users.

params.name: environment_api_key
params.description: The API key for the environment

items.docs: Creates a new webhook for an environment. The webhook will receive POST requests containing flag evaluation data whenever identities are evaluated.

params.name: organisation_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the organisation

items.docs: Retrieves a list of all webhooks configured for a specific organisation. Organisation webhooks receive audit log events for changes made across the organisation.

params.name: organisation_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the organisation

items.docs: Creates a new webhook for an organisation. The webhook will receive POST requests containing audit log events for changes made across the organisation.
